name: Ragdoll Soccer
author: Poki
description: Ragdoll Soccer is an unpredictable soccer game where floppy physics rule the field! Control your ragdoll players, move back and forth, jump, and smash the ball into the goal. Every match is a hilarious challenge as you try to master the chaos! Climb the ranks in single-player mode or challenge a friend in wild 2-player showdowns. Can you handle the madness and score the winning goal? How to play Ragdoll Soccer? One Player Jump: W Move: A/D Double Jump: press W twice Two Player Player 1: A/D to move, W to jump Player 2: the left and right arrow keys to move, the up arrow key to jump Who created Ragdoll Soccer? Ragdoll Soccer is created by 99 Top Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Ragdoll Soccer for free? You can play Ragdoll Soccer for free on Poki. Can I play Ragdoll Soccer on mobile devices and desktop? Ragdoll Soccer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Ragdoll Soccer with my friend? Yes! Ragdoll Soccer is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same device!
